stylePrompt: Create a completely original Techno-Minimalist lighting product with Germanic precision, exposed high-quality mechanics, and uncompromising functional reduction. Make pivots, bearings, rails, heat sinks, and connectors visible only when they express genuine engineering. Use disciplined dark finishes and linear cool-neutral light to evoke laboratory and aerospace accuracy while preserving comfort, safety, and manufacturability.
specificElements: A cable routed invisibly through an articulated rail
A linear optical module embedded in a dark extrusion
A modular connector with exact flush alignment
metalTranslationPrompt: Use precision stainless steel, anodized aluminum, exposed engineered pivots, linear cold-light channels, machined joints, tight tolerances, visible mechanical logic, and no decorative excess.
